name: Milan Mendpara
title: Mobile App Developer & IT Business Owner
about: I am a seasoned Mobile App Developer and IT professional with over 10 years of experience building and scaling high-performance iOS and Android applications. As the owner of my IT business in Ahmedabad, I specialize in end-to-end development, from MVP creation to deploying complex enterprise systems like DealerClick DMS and specialized community platforms like SteepleMate.

jobs.description: Led the development of over 50 mobile applications across various domains. Specialized in technical architecture, cross-platform migrations, and real-time streaming.
